title: gladiolus aquamontanus
intro: Gladiolus aquamontanus is a species of flowering plant in the family Iridaceae, commonly known as a water gladiolus. The plant is traditionally used in medicine due to its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties. It is believed to have various health benefits, such as reducing swelling and alleviating pain, as well as treating skin conditions and wounds. The plant is often prepared as a herbal remedy, typically through infusions or decoctions, which can be used to treat a range of ailments.
